title: isolepis tetragona
intro: Isolepis tetragona, also known as the Rush or Spike Rush, is a perennial aquatic plant native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Isolepis tetragona include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and act as a natural antiseptic to prevent infection. Isolepis tetragona can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
